title: PitchBet
tagline: Play-money prediction market for pitch competitions — the audience bets fake cash on who wins, odds move live.

title: Revenue Dashboard
tagline: One page answering the only question that matters: is anything actually making money?

title: Caspian
tagline: A game that so far is just a machine for generating 2,000 fake in-game emails trying to sell you something.

title: RobloxBR
tagline: A Rivals-style Roblox battle royale, written as readable Rojo source instead of a black-box place file.

title: Meme Race
tagline: Turn $20 into $10K before Will does — leveraged meme-coin bets racing a rival down a synthwave 3D track.

title: Ghostbike
tagline: A stealth range computer that tells your Sur-Ron how far it can really go, not the optimistic number on the dash.

title: Sneaking Out
tagline: A location spoofer with an honest name — push fake GPS to a tethered iPhone and walk a route you're not on.

title: Camera Watch
tagline: Maps the license-plate-reader cameras near you, so you know exactly when you're being recorded.

title: Macintosh Disk
tagline: A Mac OS 8 boot disk chopped into 95MB chunks so a browser can Range-fetch and boot it.

title: Hacking Resources Mirror
tagline: 14,600 infosec cheatsheets and payloads, harvested text-only so you can read them without running anything.

title: Dad's Birthday Sites
tagline: Every year my dad gets a birthday website. This is three years of the tradition.

title: Night Shift
tagline: Boot the Mac, watch a sci-fi startup sequence, and land in six terminals already running Claude.

title: Glitchpilled
tagline: A PIL script that prints one persona's banner and pfp in an NZT gold-and-cyan glitch palette.

title: 805 Agents
tagline: AI agents built and installed in person for Santa Barbara businesses. Flat $500, then monthly.

title: UG Social
tagline: Point it at a Shopify store and it renders daily 9:16 product videos with a local model — $0, no editor.

title: Work Report
tagline: Turns a week of git commits into a styled report someone would actually read.

title: CF Migrate
tagline: One idempotent script to repoint 22 Porkbun domains at Cloudflare DNS. Dry-run first.

title: Term Organizer
tagline: Inventory, tile, and cull twenty open Terminal windows without touching the mouse.

title: PycharmProjects
tagline: The default PyCharm hello-world, committed for an honest catalog. It does nothing.

title: Insta Bots
tagline: An Instagram-bot idea that never got past its README. An empty repo, told honestly.
